name: @godrix/businessmap-mcp

scripts.dev: npm run build && export DANGEROUSLY_OMIT_AUTH=true && npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node ./dist/server.js
scripts.pack:mcpb:slim: npm run build && rm -rf node_modules && npm ci --omit=dev --ignore-scripts && npx --yes @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack
scripts.publish:next: npm run build && npm publish --access public --tag next
scripts.publish:latest: npm run build && npm publish --access public --tag latest

author: Godrix
description: MCP server for Businessmap Kanbanize, exposing tools for managing business entities like boards, cards, and columns, facilitating LLM interaction.
